sectiondef.header: Convenience macros for static menu definition

briefdescription.para: Define a numeric value editor item.

memberdef.name: SYN_MENU_ROOT
memberdef.initializer: static const SYN_MenuItem name = SYN_MENU_SUBMENU(#name, items)

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* SYN_MenuRenderFn) (const struct SYN_Menu *menu, void *ctx)
memberdef.name: SYN_MenuRenderFn

briefdescription.para: Menu render callback — called after each navigation change.

parameterdescription.para: Root menu item (should be a SUBMENU).
Render callback (called after each navigation action).

briefdescription.para: Move selection up. In edit mode: increment value.
Move selection down. In edit mode: decrement value.
Enter: navigate into submenu, toggle, start editing, or fire callback.
Back: leave submenu or exit edit mode.
Get the number of items in the current menu level.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the selected menu item.

briefdescription.para: Force a render (e.g. after external state change).

detaileddescription.para: Static, data-driven menus for CLI or display. No dynamic allocation. Navigation via up/down/enter/back. Supports submenus, callbacks, toggles, and integer values with min/max/step.
